metadata.name: microlearn-gen-course
metadata.summary: A python package for generating microlearn course content

modules.name: gen_course.gen_course_articles_titles
documentation: Generator for course's articles titles.

classes.name: gen_course.gen_course_articles_titles.GenCourseArticleTitles
documentation: Generator class for course's articles titles.

modules.name: gen_course.gen_course_metadata
documentation: Generator for course's metadata(title, description, etc.) using the description as text.

classes.name: gen_course.gen_course_metadata._TranslateCourseMetadata
documentation: Generator class for translating course metadata.

classes.name: gen_course.gen_course_metadata.GenCourseMetadata
documentation: Generator class for course metadata(title, description, etc.) using the description as text.

modules.name: gen_course.gen_course_article_content
documentation: Generator for course's article's content.

classes.name: gen_course.gen_course_article_content.GenCourseContentForAllArticles
documentation: Generator class for course's article's content in batch using previous articles.

modules.name: gen_course.gen_base_v2
documentation: Base generator class for all content generators.

modules.name: gen_course.gen_answer_to_article_ques
documentation: Generator for course's article's question's answer.

classes.name: gen_course.gen_answer_to_article_ques.GenAnswerToArticleQues
documentation: Generator class to answer article's question.

functions.name: gen_course.utils.extract_json_from_text
documentation:
Extracts JSON content from a given text.

Args:
text (str): Text from which JSON content needs to be extracted.

Returns:
dict: Json content extracted from the text.

functions.name: gen_course.utils.remove_html
documentation:
Function that removes HTML tags from a string.

Args:
    html_string: str

Returns:
    str: String without HTML tags

functions.name: gen_course.utils.get_native_languages
documentation:
Function that returns the native languages.

Returns:
    list[str]: Native languages

functions.name: gen_course.utils.get_supported_languages_iso_639_1
documentation:
Function that returns the supported languages with their ISO 639-1 codes.

Returns:
    dict[str:(str, str)]: Supported languages with their ISO 639-1 codes

functions.name: gen_course.utils.get_iso_639_1_from_language_name
documentation:
Function that returns the ISO 639-1 code from the language name.

Args:
    language_name: str

Returns:
    str: ISO 639-1 code or None if not found

functions.name: gen_course.utils.get_language_name_from_iso_639_1
documentation:
Function that returns the language name from the ISO 639-1 code.

Args:
    iso_639_1: str

Returns:
    (str, str): Language name in English and in the language itself

classes.name: gen_course.gen_article_images_prompts.GenArticleImagesPrompts
documentation: Generator class for article images prompts.

modules.name: gen_course.gen_base_v3
documentation: Base generator class for all content generators.

modules.name: gen_course.gen_base
documentation: Base generator class for all content generators.

modules.name: gen_course.gen_course_image_prompt
documentation: Generator for course's image generation prompt via other tools like MidJourney.

classes.name: gen_course.gen_course_image_prompt.GenCourseImagePrompt
documentation: Generator class for course image prompt.

classes.name: gen_course.gen_course_image_prompt.GenCourseImagePromptDallE
documentation: Generator class for course image prompt.

classes.name: gen_course.gen_course_articles.GenCourseKeypoints
documentation: Generator class for course's article's keypoints.

classes.name: gen_course.gen_course_articles._TranslateCourseContent
documentation: Generator class for translating course's article's content in batch.

classes.name: gen_course.gen_course_articles.GenCourseContent
documentation: Generator class for course's article's content in batch using articles keypoints.

classes.name: gen_course.gen_course_articles_doc._TranslateDocCourseContent
documentation: Generator class for translating course's article's content in batch.

classes.name: gen_course.gen_course_articles_doc.GenCourseContentFromDoc
documentation: Generator class for course's article's content in batch from document.
